case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. THERESA LEAVINGS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEAVINGS, THERESA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1251 TURK STREET, #611, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $8.03 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVINGS, THERESA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVINGS, THERESA
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS SENT TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS RETURNED--NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED; UNABLE TO FORWARD
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED APR-05-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS SENT TO THERESA LEAVINGS RETURNED--NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED; UNABLE TO FORWARD

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVINGS, THERESA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED APR-05-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVINGS, THERESA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVINGS, THERESA
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVINGS, THERESA
